nasb.text: There were a thousand men of Benjamin with him, with Ziba the servant of the house of Saul, and his fifteen sons and his twenty servants with him; and they rushed to the Jordan before the king.

esv.text: And with him were a thousand men from Benjamin. And Ziba the servant of the house of Saul, with his fifteen sons and his twenty servants, rushed down to the Jordan before the king,

cnv.text: 與示每同來的有一千便雅憫人，還有掃羅家的僕人洗巴，和他的十五個兒子，以及二十個僕人。他們都衝過約旦河去迎接王。

ccb.text: 有一千便雅悯人跟示每一起去迎接大卫王。扫罗的仆人洗巴带着十五个儿子和二十个仆人也赶到约旦河。
